codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for worker session `01825f51-1ca4-4699-bfdc-5a6d863d9edf`. The commit is documentation-only and updates `BackfillCursorStore.advanceCursor` method docs from strict `>` wording to `>=` with explicit 1ms epsilon tolerance and idempotent equal-timestamp semantics. This matches the implementation at that commit (`guard newUpperBound.timeIntervalSince(currentBound) >= -epsilon`) and satisfies the feature contract requiring comment/behavior alignment with no runtime code change.
